description.from: Engraves a sigil on 2 enemy, dealing 864*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 547.3% of ATK P.DMG and reducing P.DEF by 20% for 5sec. This skill gains an additional 500 DEF Penetration, and DMG increases by up to 200% based on the target’s missing HP.
description.to: Engraves a rune on the target, dealing up to ??? P.DMG that ignores DEF based on missing HP and reducing their P.DEF by 50% for 8 sec.

description.from: Restores 621*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 100.8% of ATK HP to all allies, then additionally restores 124*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 20.2% of ATK HP every 0.8sec for 4sec, and reduces P.DMG taken by 30%.
Deals 690*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 450% of ATK P.DMG to all enemies, removes positive effects, and silences them for 1.8sec.
description.to: Deals ??? P.DMG to all enemies, and dispels all positive effects. Inflicts Silences on target for 3 sec.

description.from: Every 12sec, negates damage 2 times for the 2 allies with the lowest current HP.
description.to: Every 10 sec, engraves a rune upon the ally with the lowest HP and recovers a total of ??? HP for 10 sec.

description.from: [Rune of Silence] Increases DMG the target takes by 15% and reduces CC Resist by {0} for 10 sec.
description.to: [Rune of Silence] Target takes 15% increased DMG for 10 sec, and target's CC resistance is reduced by {0}.

description.from: Every 20 seconds, for 10 seconds, All Defense is increased by {0}% and Attack Speed by {1}, and the first skill used gains an additional effect. [Seal of Weakening] - Gains 500 additional Defense Penetration. [Seal of Healing] - Clears all debuffs on yourself upon use. [Seal of Silence] - Silence duration is increased
description.to:
At the beginning of each battle, increases P.DEF and M.DEF by {0}% ATK Spd by {1} for 15 sec, and adds an additional effect to the first skill used.
[Rune of Healing] - Dispels CC inflicted on caster before the skill is cast.
[Rune of Silence] - Increases Silence duration by 1 sec.

description.from: Summons the soul of Phoenix Quill, Belisa, creating a shield on the 4 allies with the highest ATK for 10sec that absorbs 500% of ATK DMG and grants immunity to CC, and increases DMG dealt to enemies by 20% for 10sec. Afterwards, dispels positive effects of enemies in a frontal line and deals [DAMAGE] P.DMG.
description.to: Summons the soul of Phoenix Quill, Belisa, creating a shield on an ally with the highest ATK for 10 sec that absorbs ??? DMG, grants immunity to CC, and increase DMG dealt to enemies by 20% for 10 sec. Afterward, dispels positive effects of frontal enemies in a straight line and deals ??? P.DMG

1.from: Changes Skill Activation Requirements to 3 times.
1.to: Changes Skill Activation requirements to 3 times.

2.from: Prevents hit enemies from receiving positive effects for 4 sec.
2.to: Hit enemies cannot receive positive effects for 5 sec.
